title: Latch pressure regulator
abstract: A product for maintaining regulated fluid pressure. A regulating spool may have a longitudinal spool bore with a first end exposed to the regulated fluid pressure and a second end exposed to a low pressure. A hood at the first end may extend to a terminal edge, defining a transverse opening through the regulating spool. A position spool may extend through the spool bore and may be engaged with an actuator. The position spool may have a cross bore and an outer surface and may be rotatable relative to the regulating spool. The opening may expose a segment of the outer surface of the position spool. The regulating spool may translate longitudinally relative to the position spool under the regulated fluid pressure, establishing registry between the opening and cross bore. The actuator may be a motor with cogging torque, holding the position spool against rotation when the motor is de-energized.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . A product for maintaining a regulated fluid pressure comprising a regulating spool that defines a spool bore with a first end of the regulating spool exposed to the regulated fluid pressure and a second end of the regulating spool exposed to a low pressure, the spool bore extending longitudinally through the regulating spool, the first end has a hood extending to a terminal edge of the regulating spool, the hood defining an opening through the regulating spool in a direction transverse to the spool bore, a position spool extending through the spool bore, an actuator engaged with the position spool, the position spool having an outer surface and being rotatable relative to the regulating spool by the actuator, the position spool has a cross bore, the opening exposing a segment of the outer surface of the position spool, the regulating spool translatable longitudinally relative to the position spool so that the regulated fluid pressure causes the regulating spool to translate which establishes registry between the opening and the cross bore, wherein the actuator is a motor with a cogging torque holding the position spool against rotation when the motor is de-energized. 2. The product according to claim 1 wherein the regulating spool has a slot and further comprising a pin extending into the slot to prevent the regulating spool from rotating. 3. The product according to claim 1 wherein the actuator is energized to selectively rotate the position spool to vary the regulated fluid pressure. 4. The product according to claim 3 wherein the actuator is a stepping motor with a permanent magnet rotor. 5. The product according to claim 1 wherein the hood is shaped to expose an increasing amount of the outer surface of the position spool in a direction toward the terminal edge. 6. The product according to claim 5 wherein the hood includes double helical surfaces. 7. A product for establishing a regulated fluid pressure comprising a regulating spool extending in a longitudinal direction, a position spool 

 extending through the regulating spool, the position spool is rotatable relative to the regulating spool, the position spool defines a cross bore extending through the position spool, the regulating spool configured to translate longitudinally relative to the position spool to control the regulated fluid pressure to a set point by uncovering and covering the cross bore, with an actuator rotating the position spool to vary the set point, the actuator establishing a cogging torque when de-energized holding the position spool against rotation and thereby maintaining the set point. 8. The product according to claim 7 wherein regulating spool has a slot and further comprising a pin extending into the slot to prevent the regulating spool from rotating. 9. The product according to claim 7 wherein the position spool defines an exhaust bore through the position spool, the cross bore intersects the exhaust bore, and further comprising a reservoir, wherein the exhaust bore is open to the reservoir. 10. The product according to claim 7 wherein the actuator is a stepping motor. 1 1 . The product according to claim 7 wherein the regulating spool includes a hood shaped to expose a varying amount of the position spool when the position spool is rotated by the actuator. 12. The product according to claim 1 1 wherein the hood includes double helical surfaces. 13 A pressure regulator comprising a block defining a main bore that extends in a longitudinal direction into the block to an end, a regulating spool positioned in the main bore and configured to translate longitudinally in the main bore, the regulating spool has a wall defining a spool bore extending through the regulating spool in the longitudinal direction and the regulating spool defining an opening through the wall, a spring disposed in the main bore and compressed between the end and the regulating spool, a position spool that has an exhaust bore extending in the position spool in the longitudinal direction, and a cross bore extending through the position spool in a transverse direction and intersecting the exhaust bore, the position spool disposed in the spool bore so that the cross bore variably registers with the opening, the position spool fixed against translation in the longitudinal 

 direction and an actuator engaged with the position spool to rotate the position spool within the spool bore of the regulating spool. 14. The pressure regulator according to claim 13 further comprising a pin engaging the regulating spool to prevent rotation of the regulating spool in the main bore. 15. The pressure regulator according to claim 14 wherein an exhaust chamber is defined in the main bore adjacent the end and a control chamber is defined in the main bore across the regulating spool from the exhaust chamber wherein the pressure regulator is configured to maintain a set pressure in the control chamber by exhausting pressure from the control chamber and through the opening, the cross bore, the exhaust bore and the exhaust chamber.
